## Description
Provide a clear summary of the changes introduced in this pull request and which issue they resolve.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (e.g. updating docs/ files or README)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented on my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding updates to the documentation.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or analyze errors.
- [ ] I have verified that unit tests pass successfully.
- [ ] Verification has been done on an active emulator/device.
